name: DisasterView
description: DisasterView is a large-scale UAV/drone aerial segmentation dataset covering four natural disaster types (earthquake, flood, tornado, wildfire). It contains 29,673 annotated frames from 774 unique videos with pixel-level polygon annotations for 10 semantic classes. Splits are video-disjoint to prevent data leakage.

creator.name: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI)

cr:distribution.name: disasterview-raw
cr:distribution.description: Raw JPEG frames with YOLO-seg annotation .txt files, organized by disaster type and video ID.

cr:distribution.name: split_manifest.json
cr:distribution.description: Authoritative video-disjoint train/val/test split. Use this — not Roboflow's built-in split.

cr:distribution.name: video_provenance.csv
cr:distribution.description: Source video metadata: YouTube ID, title, uploader, upload date, resolution, kept/rejected status.

cr:recordSet.name: frames
cr:recordSet.description: Annotated UAV video frames with segmentation labels.

cr:field.name: image
cr:field.description: JPEG frame extracted from UAV disaster video.

cr:field.name: annotation
cr:field.description: YOLO-seg polygon annotation (class_id x1 y1 x2 y2 ...). Normalized to [0,1].

cr:field.name: disaster_type
cr:field.description: Disaster category: earthquake | flood | tornado | wildfire.

cr:field.name: video_id
cr:field.description: YouTube video ID. Frames from the same video share this ID.

cr:field.name: split
cr:field.description: Video-disjoint split assignment: train | val | test. From split_manifest.json.

cr:field.name: clip_confidence
cr:field.description: CLIP verification confidence score (raw cosine similarity, range ~0.16–0.31). Frames below 0.22 are flagged.

cr:recordSet.name: class_labels
cr:recordSet.description: 10 semantic segmentation classes for aerial disaster imagery.

cr:field.name: instance_count
cr:field.description: Total number of annotated polygon instances across all frames.

cr:field.name: area_pct
cr:field.description: Approximate percentage of total annotated pixel area.

rai:dataCollection: Automated pipeline: YouTube yt-dlp download → CLIP+Laplacian quality filter → PySceneDetect keyframe extraction → DINOv2 deduplication → CLIP+k-means annotation → CLIP verification.
rai:dataCollectionType: Web scraping of publicly available YouTube videos.
rai:dataUseCases: Disaster response, UAV autonomy, semantic segmentation research.
rai:dataBiases: English-language YouTube queries may under-represent disasters in non-English speaking regions. Class distribution is imbalanced: water_flood and building_damaged dominate. Tornado is over-represented (41% of frames).
